items.title_en: Remnants from Tropical Storm Arthur drench Gulf states, flooding homes and forcing evacuations - CBS News
items.title_zh: 热带风暴亚瑟的残余物淹没了海湾国家，淹没了房屋并迫使人们疏散 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻
items.desc_en: Remnants from Tropical Storm Arthur drench Gulf states, flooding homes and forcing evacuations  CBS NewsLife-threatening flash flood emergencies issued as Arthur's remnants slam South  FOX WeatherTrop
items.desc_zh: 热带风暴“亚瑟”的残余物淹没了海湾国家，淹没了房屋并迫使人们疏散。哥伦比亚广播公司新闻随着“亚瑟”热带风暴的残余物袭击南佛罗里达州，发布了危及生命的山洪紧急情况。福克斯 WeatherTrop

items.title_en: U.S. opens tariff probe targeting Germany’s drug pricing policies
items.title_zh: 美国对德国药品定价政策展开关税调查
items.desc_en: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said Germany's proposal to reduce spending on medicines was "a serious step backwards."
items.desc_zh: 美国贸易代表杰米森·格里尔表示，德国减少药品支出的提议是“严重的倒退”。

items.title_en: Russia threatens escalation after Ukraine hits Moscow with largest-ever drone attack
items.title_zh: 乌克兰对莫斯科发动有史以来最大规模的无人机袭击后，俄罗斯威胁升级
items.desc_en: Russia has pledged to carry out frequent and "massive group strikes" against Ukraine shortly after Kyiv launched a barrage of drones on Moscow.
items.desc_zh: 在基辅向莫斯科发射无人机后不久，俄罗斯承诺对乌克兰进行频繁的“大规模集体打击”。

items.title_en: Hormuz relief may not ease the economic toll that's already 'baked in,' analysts warn
items.title_zh: 分析人士警告称，霍尔木兹海峡救援可能无法减轻已经“根深蒂固”的经济损失
items.desc_en: Early signs of reopening of the Strait of Hormuz have lifted the most acute threat to global energy supplies but economic damages from the war will take months to unwind.
items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡重新开放的早期迹象已经消除了对全球能源供应的最严重威胁，但战争造成的经济损失需要几个月的时间才能消除。

items.title_en: Zimbabwe MPs pass bill to extend president's time in power
items.title_zh: 津巴布韦国会议员通过延长总统执政时间的法案
items.desc_en: The proposal would extend Emmerson Mnangagwa's term by two years and scrap direct presidential elections.
items.desc_zh: 该提案将把埃默森·姆南加古瓦的任期延长两年，并取消总统直接选举。

items.title_en: US-Iran talks postponed as Vance pulls out of Switzerland trip
items.title_zh: 万斯退出瑞士之行，美伊会谈推迟
items.desc_en: Eighteen people and four IDF soldiers are also killed in clashes in Lebanon, despite a truce meant to be in place in the country.
items.desc_zh: 尽管黎巴嫩本应停战，但仍有 18 人和 4 名以色列国防军士兵在黎巴嫩的冲突中丧生。

items.desc_zh: 分析人士认为，中东冲突的持久解决方案需要一段时间才能实现。

items.title_en: Andy Burnham wins Makerfield by-election, opening path to challenging Prime Minister Keir Starmer
items.title_zh: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 赢得梅克菲尔德补选，为挑战总理凯尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 开辟道路
items.desc_en: Andy Burnham won the Makerfield by-election, defeating Reform UK by more than 9,000 votes with nearly 55% of the vote.

items.title_en: Zealand Pharma stock suffered its two worst days on record. Here's what's next for the weight loss drugmaker
items.title_zh: 新西兰制药公司的股价经历了有记录以来最糟糕的两天。这是减肥制药商的下一步计划
items.desc_en: While the market's enthusiasm for one of Zealand's experimental drugs has cooled, investors are shifting focus to amylin-based medicines as a growth driver

items.title_en: Do it at home too, women tell Japanese fans who cleaned World Cup stadium
items.title_zh: 女性告诉清洁世界杯体育场的日本球迷，在家也可以这样做
items.desc_en: Some see a double standard: Japanese men who clean in public while their wives do all the housework.
items.desc_zh: 有些人看到了双重标准：日本男人在公共场所打扫卫生，而他们的妻子则承担所有家务。

items.title_en: In Trump's shadow, Vance becomes face of Iran deal
items.title_zh: 在特朗普的阴影下，万斯成为伊朗协议的代言人
items.desc_en: His fierce defence of the Iran plan amid mounting criticism comes as speculation intensifies about a possible 2028 presidential run.
items.desc_zh: 在越来越多的批评之际，他对伊朗计划进行了激烈的辩护，与此同时，人们对 2028 年可能竞选总统的猜测也在加剧。

items.title_en: Bowen: US-Iran deal raises inescapable question of what the war was for
